# Amor Alice

Amor Alice is a Japanese Ragdoll specialty home cattery in Chiba, Japan.
Official site: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/

## Main Pages

- Home: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/
- Ragdoll kittens: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/kittens/
- Parent cats: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/parents/
- Daily cattery notes: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/daily/
- Graduated cats: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/graduates/
- Adoption journey: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/journey/
- FAQ: https://catteryamoralice-ragdoll.github.io/faq/

## Summary

Amor Alice helps families who want to welcome a Ragdoll kitten. The site explains kitten availability, parent cats, visit consultation, preparation before adoption, and aftercare support.

## Contact

- LINE: https://lin.ee/4A4dqHU
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cattery_amor.alice/
- Email: cattery227.amor.alice@gmail.com
